title: Robust finding source and resolve reason
goal: Preserve an unknown **Source:** value verbatim instead of downgrading it to adversarial (160-2), and add an optional --reason to 'mini findings resolve' to record why a finding was closed.

steps.title: Preserve & display unknown source (160-2)
steps.detail: Add rawSource?: string to Finding. parseEntryBody captures the raw **Source:** token; parseFindings sets rawSource only when the value is not a known source. serializeFindings emits f.rawSource ?? f.source; renderFinding shows rawSource ?? source. Unit tests: read->serialize->reopen keeps **Source:** security byte-identical on disk and shows it verbatim in list.

steps.title: Add reason field with round-trip
steps.detail: Add optional reason?: string to Finding + REASON_RE; parseEntryBody consumes a **Reason:** line order-independently (not swallowed into the title), serializeFindings emits it in a fixed slot (after **Source:**). Tests: reason round-trips, mixed-order metadata, old files without the line round-trip unchanged.

steps.title: Thread reason into resolve, clear on reopen
steps.detail: resolveFinding(cwd, id, reason?) sets the reason via setFindingStatus when flipping to resolved; reopenFinding clears it. mini done auto-close and mini undo paths pass no reason and stay unchanged. Tests: resolve stores reason, reopen drops it, already-resolved + reason is a no-op (reason not overwritten).

steps.title: Wire --reason CLI flag + reject on reopen
steps.detail: Add --reason <text> to the findings command; findingsResolve binds it into the flip closure (one reason applies to the whole id batch, existing per-id reporting/exit code preserved); mini findings reopen --reason returns an error, not a silent ignore. Update command help + docs/. Tests: resolve --reason happy path, reopen --reason rejected, multi-id batch with one reason.

autoCommit.subject: Phase 186: Robust finding source and resolve reason
